/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc -std=c17 -pedantic -Wall -Werror -ggdb -g -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX12.3.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.1 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  CMakeFiles/image-matcher.dir/src/bmp.c.o CMakeFiles/image-matcher.dir/src/file_cmp.c.o CMakeFiles/image-matcher.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/image-matcher.dir/src/util.c.o  -o image-matcher
